arts.ttl: Final 10 games: Leeds, Sheff Utd, Burnley, Sunderland
arts.sum: A defeat at Portsmouth has allowed Sheffield United to now be sitting level on points with Leeds going into the final 10 games of the Championship season. Leeds United have 10 games left to ensure that they gain automatic promotion back to the Premier League, sitting top of the table on goal difference coming into these midweek fixtures.

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI vs Millwall as Bogle decision made amid risk of ban
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has indicated that he will not be rotating Jayden Bogle out of the side for Wednesday’s match with Millwall despite the right-back being a card away from a two-game suspension. The midweek game with Millwall is Leeds United ’s 37th league match of the season.

arts.ttl: Club director confirms defender has signed for Leeds United
arts.sum: Leeds United are setting their sights on the future as they push for a return to the Premier League, identifying young talents who can contribute to the club’s long-term success. One such prospect is Nigerian centre-back Leonard Ngenge, with previous reports confirming that the Whites have secured a pre-contract agreement for the highly-rated teenager.
